indexes.name: Global Singles Equal Weight
indexes.description: Each eligible Pokemon single card contributes equally to percent movement.

indexes.name: Global Singles Market Weight
indexes.description: Tracks total value movement across eligible Pokemon single cards.

indexes.name: Booster Boxes Equal Weight
indexes.description: Each eligible Pokemon booster box/display contributes equally to percent movement.

indexes.name: Booster Boxes Market Weight
indexes.description: Tracks total value movement across eligible Pokemon booster boxes and displays.

indexes.name: Booster Packs Equal Weight
indexes.description: Each eligible Pokemon booster pack contributes equally to percent movement.

indexes.name: Booster Packs Market Weight
indexes.description: Tracks total value movement across eligible Pokemon individual booster packs.
